About.title: About us
About.lead: The story of La Félicità began over 8 years ago with a simple idea: to create a place where people feel welcome, share a good meal and rediscover the authenticity of Italian cuisine.
About.body: Since opening, the restaurant has grown without ever losing its soul. True to its values, La Félicità continues to offer generous cooking, a warm welcome and a convivial experience that brings together families, friends and lovers of Italian gastronomy.
About.closing: Even today, we are proud to keep alive the spirit that has driven our house since day one.

pizza.title: Homemade pizzas
pizza.text: Fresh dough, selected ingredients and oven baking for flavourful, authentic pizzas.

pasta.text: Linguini, rigatoni, ravioli and house specialities prepared with fresh products and a touch of Italian tradition.
